allow: Bash(kitty +list-fonts 2>/dev/null | grep -i "jetbrains" || fc-list : family style | grep -i "jetbrains" | sort)

Bash(/Applications/Kitty-nightly.app/Contents/MacOS/kitty \\
  --title "resize-test" \\
  -o hide_window_decorations=titlebar-only \\
  -o background_opacity=0.92 \\
  -o background_blur=20 \\
  -o initial_window_width=60c \\
  -o initial_window_height=30c \\
  -o confirm_os_window_close=0 \\
  -o remember_window_size=no \\
  -o placement_strategy=center \\
  /Users/pattobrien/.dotfiles/Scripts/picker-resize-inner)

Bash(cd /Users/pattobrien/.dotfiles/.config/raycast && pnpx create-raycast-extension@latest --name wt --title "Worktree Manager" --description "Manage git worktrees with tmux sessions" --type list --template react --organization "" 2>&1)
